allow: PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'C:\\Users\\CICT\\Desktop\\lv\\backend'; npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/me" -Method GET -ErrorAction Stop; "Server responded: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { "Server is UP \(got $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) — expected without token\)" } else { "Server NOT running: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'C:\\Users\\CICT\\Desktop\\lv\\frontend'; npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal; "Frontend started in background window")
